How to Play

✦ ✦ ✦

Movement

Walk with ← → or A D

Leap into the air with Space, W, or ↑

Crouch low with ↓ or S

Combat

Swing your dagger with F, J, or X

Raise your guard with Shift, K, or Z

Strike spiders mid-jump for an airborne slash

The Realms

Choose between the shadowed Forest and the open Highlands from the menu above the scene
